title: Insufficient Access Control
description: The system's access control mechanisms are not adequately defined or enforced, potentially allowing users to gain unauthorized access to privileged resources or functionalities.  Without proper role-based access control (RBAC) and least privilege principles, users could escalate their privileges to perform actions they are not authorized to perform.
affected_component: Application Servers, Database Servers, System Configuration
attack_vector: Exploiting vulnerabilities in the application code, misconfigured access controls, or privilege escalation vulnerabilities.
mitigations: Implement Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) to restrict user access to only the resources they need.
Enforce the principle of least privilege, granting users only the minimum necessary permissions.
Regularly review and audit user access rights to ensure they remain appropriate.
